chunks.text: Course: EE 198 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 198. Directed Group Study for Advanced Undergraduates Catalog Description: Group study of selected topics in electrical engineering, usually relating to new developments. Units: 1-4 Also Offered As: ELENG 198 Prerequisites: 2.0 GPA or better; 60 units completed. Formats: Fall: 1-4 hours of directed group study per week Spring: 1-4 hours of directed group study per week Grading Basis: Pass/Not Pass Final Exam Status: No Class Schedule (Spring 2026): EE 198-2 – We 20:00-21:59, Cory 125 – Class Notes Please fill out this form to request enrollment: http://berkie.ee/hope-sp26-apply EE 198-4 – Th 20:00-21:59, Cory 125 – Class Notes Please fill out this form to request enrollment: http://berkie.ee/hope-sp26-apply EE 198-5 – Mo 20:00-21:59, Cory 125 – Class Notes Please fill out this form to request enrollment: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScvT45IxxQ-a9T29Scgec823s7A129hY3zFY7C6xQww_XUH4A/viewform EE 198-20 – Class Notes - Class will meet in the Berkeley Wireless Research Center. - Exact time & location will be determined with admitted students. - Please follow this link to find the enrollment request form: https://edstem.org/us/courses/23247/discussion/7432880 EE 198-22 – Tu 20:00-21:59, Cory 125 – Class Notes Please fill out this form to request enrollment: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfjqhIHqFYBIK2dsasY8eQTa15NMeXwW_QLXCrh9Yp9qxj_6w/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=104544059727563842697 Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
